confidence.explanation: Core FE feature passes: Invoice render shows correct unique identifier (TOTEWCLQEH), Hotel Room charge is $119.00 (not INV-609.00 — regression cleared), and running balance reconciles end-to-end. Two API shape questions need review: (1) GET /so/invoice response contains `sales_order_number` but no distinct `invoice_number` field — FE uses sales_order_number as the Invoice Number, which may be by design; (2) no `so_number` field present, only `sales_order_number`. These need dev clarification against the original API spec for INV-613/614/615 before final sign-off. All API calls returned 200; math reconciles perfectly.

test_cases.title: API — GET /so/invoice returns invoice_number field
test_cases.note: GET /so/invoice returns HTTP 200. Response shape: {invoice, terms, customer, location, booking}. invoice object keys: [so_id, sales_order_number, total_due, status, currency, friendly_name, line_items, subtotal, taxes, total]. FINDING: `invoice_number` field is absent. `sales_order_number` = 'TOTEWCLQEH' is present and used by FE as the Invoice Number. Needs dev confirmation — is `sales_order_number` intentionally serving as invoice_number, or was a separate `invoice_number` field required by INV-613/614/615 spec?

test_cases.title: API — GET /so/invoice response shape includes so_number field
test_cases.note: No `so_number` field in response. `sales_order_number` = 'TOTEWCLQEH' is present. If `so_number` was a required distinct field per spec, this is a gap. Additional finding: `currency` field = '' (empty string) — may need investigation.

test_cases.title: FE — Invoice render shows correct Invoice Number (not ticket ID placeholder)
test_cases.note: PASS. Invoice Preview dialog opened via Print Invoice button. Invoice Number displayed: 'TOTEWCLQEH' — NOT 'INV-609' or 'INV-609.00'. Hotel Room charge (326 Room) shows $119.00, NOT 'INV-609.00'. Regression from product context is CLEARED. Balance Due: $126.85 confirmed in DOM.

test_cases.title: FE — Invoice total and running balance reconcile correctly
test_cases.note: PASS. Running balance sequence: $119.00 (room) → +$9.52 PST 8% = $128.52 → +$2.38 MRDT = $130.90 → +$5.95 GST = $136.85 → -$5.00 deposit = $131.85 → -$5.00 deposit = $126.85. Summary table: Subtotal $119.00, Total $136.85, Deposits $10.00, Balance Due $126.85. Matches API total_due (12685 cents = $126.85). Regression from product context (balance never reconciling) is CLEARED.

test_cases.title: Universal — Console error scan
test_cases.note: PASS with note. 1 console error: Cognito favicon.ico 404 (https://xin-auth-np.auth.ca-central-1.amazoncognito.com/favicon.ico). This is a third-party Cognito hosted-UI resource, not an app-authored request — allowlisted. No application console errors.

test_cases.title: Universal — Network error scan (4xx/5xx)
test_cases.note: PASS. All app API calls returned 200: GET /user/profile, POST /booking/search, GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8, POST /inventory/search. No 4xx/5xx on app-authored requests.

test_cases.title: Universal — Broken asset/image scan
test_cases.note: PASS. No broken images or assets observed on reservation details page or invoice preview dialog during the session. Cognito favicon 404 is third-party (allowlisted, same as UV-1).
